title: Al-Ma'mun's consummation of his marriage to al-Hasan b. Sahl's daughter Burin and the sumptuous celebrations at Fam al-Silh
description: Al-Ma'mun's consummation of his marriage to al-Hasan b. Sahl's daughter Burin and the sumptuous celebrations at Fam al-Silh. Recorded under the year 210 AH (825–826 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
